meta.title: Amirtaha Pourhaji | Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Amirtaha Pourhaji, Full-Stack Developer specialized in Telegram bots, automation, and web architecture.

hero.name: Amirtaha Pourhaji
hero.bio: I am 18 years old and have been actively working in web development and automation tools for the past 3 years. My core focus is on implementing scalable front-end architectures and robust back-end engines. I also have hands-on experience in Linux server administration, basic networking, and security, always aiming to write clean, optimized, and maintainable code.

features.title: Why Work With Me?
features.subtitle: The core values I bring to your next digital product

items.title: Rapid & On-Time Delivery
items.desc: Your time is precious. Projects are executed with precise planning and delivered exactly on deadline without compromising quality.

items.title: Flexible & Installment Payments
items.desc: To help you manage your financial resources better, milestone-based and installment payment options are available for large scale projects.

items.title: Dedicated 24/7 Support
items.desc: Our collaboration doesn't end at deployment. I provide guaranteed technical support, bug fixing, and continuous server monitoring.

items.title: Clean & Scalable Architecture
items.desc: Leveraging the latest software engineering patterns. My code doesn't just run fast today—it's built to scale seamlessly in the future.

timeline.title: My Professional Journey
timeline.subtitle: A summary of my growth and milestones in the software development world
timeline.item1_desc: Designed and deployed high-performance group management bots and task automation scripts using modular architectures under Node.js and structured databases.
timeline.item2_desc: Crafted dynamic and responsive user interfaces using React and Next.js, optimizing core web vitals and implementing strict routing-based internationalization.
timeline.item3_desc: Deployed applications on Linux servers, configured web servers, secured network communications, and established robust back-end monitoring systems.
